content.en:
"Snow Feather Great Ancestor!"

Ye Tian carefully looked at this Great Ancestor, and could initially judge that the other party had condensed a lot of immeasurable blood, but it was not a high-level immeasurable lifeform that had just entered the third stage like the Void Whale Overlord.

"I'm afraid the strength of this Snow Feather Ancestor is no less than mine!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At this time, Xue Yu Great Ancestor was also looking at Ye Tian.

"The information is different from what the Fengyin Great Ancestor provided before, this Xuanming Great Ancestor has clearly stepped into the second stage of a high-level immeasurable life form, and has even condensed a lot of immeasurable bones!"

Snow Feather Ancestor said secretly.

Of course.

He didn't think that Ye Tian was his opponent, so there was no difference between the second stage and the first stage.

"Xuanming Great Ancestor, according to Fengyin Great Ancestor, you have Hailou Heavenly Gold in your hand, and you are willing to use Hailou Heavenly Gold to trade Hailou Gold with our Remnant Heaven Pavilion?" Xue Yu Great Ancestor asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tianying said.

Xue Yu Great Ancestor was secretly surprised, all the major forces lacked Hailou Tianjin.

In the realm of high-level immeasurable lifeforms, the largest number is naturally the first-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, but the backbone is the second-stage high-level immeasurable bodies that have condensed the immeasurable bones.

For example, in the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, many things were handled by second-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms like Fengyin Great Ancestor, and only if they couldn't handle them well, a third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform like him would appear.

And all the second-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms were eager to condense immeasurable blood and impact the third stage, but they lacked such a substance as Hailou Tianjin.

No matter how powerful the Remnant Heaven Pavilion was, there was not enough Hailou Heavenly Gold to cultivate the high-level immeasurable lifeforms under his command.

Therefore, if they have the opportunity to obtain Hailou Tianjin, they will naturally take it at all costs.

Now.

When Xue Yu Great Ancestor heard that Ye Tian was going to exchange Hailou Tianjin for Hailou Gold, he was also very confused, but if such a deal was really completed, it would also be a good thing for the Remnant Heaven Pavilion.

It's just that he doesn't know how much Hailou Tianjin Ye Tian wants to take to trade Hailou Gold, if it's too little, it won't make much sense.

"I hope there are more than ten yuan, so that I don't come in vain!"

Snow Feather Ancestor said secretly.

Immediately, he asked Ye Tian again: "Xuanming Great Ancestor, how much Hailou Gold are you going to exchange for a piece of Hailou Heavenly Gold?"

No Great Ancestor had ever traded like this, so there was no uniform price.

Ye Tian said directly: "10,000 pieces of Hailou gold in exchange for a piece of Hailou Tianjin, this is the offer I gave!"

This price is also the price he set with the Void Whale Overlord at the beginning, so his price remains unchanged.

"Yes!"

Xue Yu Ancestor directly agreed.

Although 10,000 Hailou gold is a lot, the Remnant Heaven Pavilion still has a lot of Hailou gold veins and other channels, so the reserves of Hailou gold are still quite a lot.

Even compared to the entire Voidless Galaxy, the Remnant Sky Pavilion is even stronger.

Perhaps in front of forces like the Hurricane Pavilion, the Voidless Galaxy is a real treasure of resources, and it is extremely eager to enter it, but for the Remnant Sky Pavilion, the Voidless Galaxy is just like that, it's just not worth the cost to develop.

Just like the Xuanqi Pavilion, if they were really willing, they could easily let countless Great Ancestors cross the Voidless Galaxy. 、

As for selling places and letting only a few Great Ancestors leave from the hopeless land, this matter is just the responsibility of a certain high-level immeasurable lifeform in a certain small department of Xuanqi Pavilion, and it can't rise to the eyes of the high-level Xuanqi Pavilion.

There is no fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform in the Voidless Galaxy, there may have been, but now it is gone.

And the Remnant Heaven Pavilion is a high-level immeasurable lifeform that clearly exists in the fourth stage, and there is even more than one.

It can be seen from this that the Remnant Heaven Pavilion is so powerful, and naturally there is no shortage of sea building gold.

However, due to the incomparably rare nature of the Sea Tower Tianjin, it is difficult to collect too much Sea Tower Heavenly Gold even if it is the Remnant Heaven Pavilion.

In the surprised gaze of the Snow Feather Great Ancestor, Ye Tian took out a thousand pieces of sea building gold.

According to the transaction price just now, so many Hailou Tianjin can be traded from the Remnant Heaven Pavilion to tens of millions of Hailou Gold.

"You actually have a thousand pieces of sea building gold!"

Snow Feather Ancestor was extremely surprised.

It's not that he hasn't seen so many Hailou Tianjin, but Ye Tian has no background, and it didn't take long for him to become a high-level immeasurable lifeform, he could find so many Hailou Tianjin, it's incredible!

You must know that even if he had gathered more than 2,000 Hailou Heavenly Gold in order to impact the third stage, it would have taken him endless years, and he even lost hope for a while, and wanted to give up the impact on the third stage!

"Xuanming Great Ancestor, I don't have so much Hailou Gold in my hands, and this branch doesn't have so much Hailou Gold, I need to apply for a part of Hailou Gold from the headquarters. Xue Yu Ancestor said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded, and waited for Xue Yu Great Ancestor to come over with Hailou Jin.

Swish!

The Snow Feather Great Ancestor disappeared, and Ye Tian stayed in this Remnant Heaven Pavilion branch.

Not long after, Snow Feather Ancestor returned.

"This is 10 million sea building gold!"

The Snow Feather Great Ancestor took a special device containing 10 million Hailou Gold and handed it to Ye Tian, and Ye Tian also handed over 1,000 Hailou Heavenly Gold to the Snow Feather Great Ancestor.

And so the deal was done!

Subsequently, Ye Tian directly left the Remnant Heaven Pavilion with 10 million Hailou Gold.

And after Ye Tian left, a high-level immeasurable lifeform appeared beside Xue Yu Great Ancestor, and there were two third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms among them.

After all, there is a lot of share in this transaction, a thousand Hailou Tianjin, and a little more preparation of Hailou Tianjin, it is enough to forcibly advance a high-level immeasurable lifeform at the peak of the second stage to the third stage.

Therefore, this deal was very important, and the Remnant Heaven Pavilion sent these high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

......

"The Great Ancestor of Xuanming has left the Ghost Capital Mountain!"

"How could a high-level immeasurable lifeform who came out of a hopeless land have so many Hailou Tianjin, it's incredible!"

"Do you want to do something to the Xuanming Great Ancestor?"

"No, last time the Great Ancestor of the Ape and Leopard made a move against the Great Ancestor of Xuanming, and it failed. At that time, the Xuanming Great Ancestor was still in the realm of a middle-level immeasurable life body. Afterwards, we also punished the Great Ancestor of the Ape and Leopard. Xuanming Great Ancestor is a little not simple, according to his original trajectory, it is impossible to grow so fast. In case of chance, he joined a mysterious hidden force in the Genki Realm, and thus was cultivated by the force. Maybe this time it's the mysterious force doing research, not necessarily the Xuanming Great Ancestor himself who has any problems. "

"I don't recommend doing it either, the Xuanming Great Ancestor is not simple, and when a mid-level immeasurable lifeform is a mid-level immeasurable lifeform, it is comparable to a high-level immeasurable lifeform. Moreover, he also has a hint of threat, even if he is not our opponent, but once he escapes, it will not be a good thing for our Heavenly Remnant Pavilion!"

"There's no need to do it for some Hailou Jin, even if the Xuanming Great Ancestor still has Hailou Tianjin in his hand, the amount may not be too much!"

These high-level immeasurable lifeforms deliberated for a while, and finally decided not to do anything to Ye Tian.

After all, even if you do it, you may not be able to get a satisfactory answer, so there is no need to do it.
